name: Vegetarian Paella
recipeIngredient: Lemon rind, thinly pared and cut into thin shreds
1 lb Washed and trimmed Leeks, cut into 1-inch lengths
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large, deep pan.
2. Add the brown rice and onion slices; stir until the rice is coated and begins to turn opaque.
3. Add garlic, saffron, vegetable stock (or water), lemon rind, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
4. Bring to a boil, then mix again to distribute the saffron coloring.
5. Arrange vegetables and olives attractively on top of the rice.
6. Bring to a boil once more.
7. Cover with a lid or foil and simmer for 45 minutes.
8. Sprinkle with chopped parsley before serving.
Variation: VEGETARIAN PAELLA WITH ARTICHOKES
- Use 4 to 6 globe artichokes instead of leeks. Very tender baby artichokes can be quartered; otherwise, remove the leaves and choke from the artichokes, then halve or quarter the bottoms.
- Garnish with artichoke leaves.
